'''âr-t-m''' ('''karatam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monospace|monospace]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monospace|monospace]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-t-m
|-
! Lemma
| karatam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiratam|thiratam]] || [[word:jiratam|jiratam]] || [[word:shiratam|shiratam]] || [[word:kiratam|kiratam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuratam|thuthuratam]] || [[word:jujuratam|jujuratam]] || [[word:shushuratam|shushuratam]] || [[word:kukuratam|kukuratam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuratam|thuratam]] || [[word:juratam|juratam]] || [[word:shuratam|shuratam]] || [[word:kuratam|kuratam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuratam|thuratam]] || [[word:juratam|juratam]] || [[word:shuratam|shuratam]] || [[word:kuratam|kuratam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theratam|theratam]] || [[word:jeratam|jeratam]] || [[word:sheratam|sheratam]] || [[word:keratam|keratam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoratam|thothoratam]] || [[word:jojoratam|jojoratam]] || [[word:shoshoratam|shoshoratam]] || [[word:kokoratam|kokoratam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoratam|thoratam]] || [[word:joratam|joratam]] || [[word:shoratam|shoratam]] || [[word:koratam|koratam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoratam|thoratam]] || [[word:joratam|joratam]] || [[word:shoratam|shoratam]] || [[word:koratam|koratam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠratam|thĂŠratam]] || [[word:jĂŠratam|jĂŠratam]] || [[word:shĂŠratam|shĂŠratam]] || [[word:kĂŠratam|kĂŠratam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharatam|thatharatam]] || [[word:jajaratam|jajaratam]] || [[word:shasharatam|shasharatam]] || [[word:kakaratam|kakaratam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharatam|tharatam]] || [[word:jaratam|jaratam]] || [[word:sharatam|sharatam]] || [[word:karatam|karatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharatam|tharatam]] || [[word:jaratam|jaratam]] || [[word:sharatam|sharatam]] || [[word:karatam|karatam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharatam|sharatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharatam|gosharatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharatam|gokisharatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharatamnĂŒ|sharatamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharatamnknĂŒ|gosharatamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatamnĂŒ|gokisharatamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharatamshĂ«|sharatamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharatamnkshĂ«|gosharatamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharatamshĂ«|gokisharatamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatamro|sharatamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatamnkro|gosharatamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatamro|gokisharatamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatamu|sharatamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatamnkmu|gosharatamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatamu|gokisharatamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharatamsher|sharatamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharatamnksher|gosharatamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharatamsher|gokisharatamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharatamng|sharatamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharatamnkng|gosharatamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharatamng|gokisharatamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharatamya|sharatamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharatamnkya|gosharatamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharatamya|gokisharatamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharatamyam|sharatamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharatamnkyam|gosharatamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharatamyam|gokisharatamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatamnĂŒshĂ«|sharatamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatamnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharatamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatamnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharatamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatamnĂŒro|sharatamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatamnknĂŒro|gosharatamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatamnĂŒro|gokisharatamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatamnĂŒmu|sharatamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatamnknĂŒmu|gosharatamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatamnĂŒmu|gokisharatamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatamshĂ«nĂŒ|sharatamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharatamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharatamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatamshĂ«ro|sharatamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatamnkshĂ«ro|gosharatamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatamshĂ«ro|gokisharatamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatamshĂ«mu|sharatamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatamnkshĂ«mu|gosharatamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatamshĂ«mu|gokisharatamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatamronĂŒ|sharatamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatamnkronĂŒ|gosharatamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatamronĂŒ|gokisharatamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatamroshĂ«|sharatamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatamnkroshĂ«|gosharatamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatamroshĂ«|gokisharatamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharatamromu|sharatamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharatamnkromu|gosharatamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharatamromu|gokisharatamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharatamunĂŒ|sharatamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharatamnkmunĂŒ|gosharatamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharatamunĂŒ|gokisharatamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharatamushĂ«|sharatamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharatamnkmushĂ«|gosharatamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharatamushĂ«|gokisharatamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharatamuro|sharatamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharatamnkmuro|gosharatamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharatamuro|gokisharatamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
